corpus_authoring_law.authoring_method: manual human authorship; no generation template or controller-readable source variables
corpus_authoring_law.freeze_before_model_contact: freeze all public texts and protected evaluator answers simultaneously and commit both surface hashes before model contact
outcome_independence: retain every frozen task regardless of model outcome
forbid task selection, deletion, or rewriting based on model performance
corpus_authoring_law.retention: all four frozen tasks remain in the evaluation after outcomes

fresh_inference_advantage_requirements: both routes are evaluated on the same four frozen tasks
no task is removed after outcomes
worker-route final accuracy is at least direct-baseline accuracy
worker-route total fresh prompt plus completion tokens per correct final label is lower than the direct route
cached tokens and request count are reported separately
decision_law.otherwise: report bounded capability and resource results without claiming inference advantage

direct_baseline_contract.evidence: the exact shard A passage and question, exact shard B passage and question, fixed XOR rule, and final output schema
fairness_law: do not omit evidence available to the worker route
do not use a smaller context or output allowance
direct_baseline_contract.input: both natural-language shards in one ordinary-inference request

evaluator_isolation_law.availability: separately bound surface unavailable to prompt construction and request dispatch
evaluator_isolation_law.scoring: exact pass or fail only after all route captures exist

non_controller_reconstructibility_law.controller_input_surface: natural-language task text, public schemas, and fixed XOR rule only
non_controller_reconstructibility_law.worker_information_source: binary judgments must be model-authored and absent from controller-readable structured form

public_task_contract.difficulty_calibration: easy for Agents-A1 35B when each shard is presented independently
excluded_content: template-generated passages with controller-visible source variables

resource_accounting.advantage_unit: total fresh prompt plus completion tokens per correct final label
caveats: smaller per-request context alone is not an inference advantage
wall-clock and hypothetical parallel latency remain separate
cached and fresh prompt tokens remain separate
metrics: fresh tokens per correct final label

scientific_question: Can two isolated workers generate binary semantic judgments that do not exist in controller-readable structured form, after which one simple relational synthesis produces an exact useful answer?

input_fields: worker role A and model-authored bit
worker role B and model-authored bit

worker_contract.seed_law: one future frozen seed per request role; no seed selected in this design operation
worker_contract.template_law: worker templates are structurally identical and length-matched where possible
